name: Manage World Events (Create Event)
description: Demonstrates the sequence of functions to create a new Event/Front and assign it to a starting Tick.

sequence.action: GM submits new Event data and a starting Tick.
Saves the new Event asset to the designated start Tick.
Recalculates state inheritance for all subsequent Ticks to include the new Event's traits.
Refreshes UI to display the new event on the timeline.

sequence_diagram_mermaid:
```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    actor GM
    participant Browser as PCOMP-001 (Boundary)
    participant AppServer as PCOMP-002 (Controller)
    participant Database as PCOMP-003 (Entity)

    GM->>+Browser: Clicks 'Create Event'
    Browser->>+AppServer: POST /ticks/{id}/assets (invokes LI-012 with type 'Event')
    AppServer->>+Database: INSERT INTO assets...
    Database-->>-AppServer: returns asset_id
    AppServer->>+AppServer: LF-019: Recalculate Event Inheritance
    AppServer-->>-Browser: returns {asset_id: ...}
    Browser->>-GM: Refreshes UI to show new Event
```
